entries.title: plan(tracker): refresh remediation tracker and stale work surfaces

implementationProof.note: Maps the W7 tracker workstream to concrete evidence, validation gates, blockers, and residual risks.
Documents how tracker evidence separates implementation proof from deployment proof and stale work.

evidence.note: Tracker evidence is repository-local and has no runtime deployment step.

entries.title: ops(tracker): reconcile AOS and DASH manifest state with live GitHub issues

implementationProof.note: Verifies the remediation tracker manifest and live GitHub coverage query.
Defines the AOS tracker items, ownership lanes, dependencies, and validation gates.

evidence.note: Local verification is sufficient because this is a tracker reconciliation gate.

entries.title: ops(tracker): create issue-to-evidence map for implemented remediation work

implementationProof.note: Provides the updateable issue-to-evidence map for W7 tracker closeout.
Validates the evidence map from the command line.
Covers valid evidence maps, missing blockers, missing paths, unsafe refs, and secret-like values.

evidence.note: The evidence map is repository-local and does not require runtime deployment proof.

entries.title: chore(pr): triage stale OSS readiness PR #136

implementationProof.note: PR #136 is closed, so it no longer appears as ambiguous live remediation work.

entries.title: docs(tracker): document roadmap ownership and sequencing rules

implementationProof.note: Documents issue evidence discipline, stale artifact reconciliation, branch hygiene, first-run validation, and rollback.
Documents worktree sequencing, ownership, merge order, and cleanup discipline.

evidence.note: Tracker operating rules are repository documentation and have no deployment step.

entries.title: plan(w01): Production proof and runtime closeout

implementationProof.note: W01 repo-side generated workstream is closed; live deployment proof remains tracked by #137 and #141 through #145.
GitHub App issue sync live preflight makes the stable URL, workflow state, runtime config, Render service, and Blueprint blockers machine-checkable.
Release closeout evidence now requires the GitHub App sync preflight gate before live sync proof can close.

evidence.note: Stable provider target and HTTPS ingress remain blocked externally.
Merged preflight currently fails because the sync URL is temporary, the workflow is disabled, Render services are absent, and Blueprint validation returns need_payment_info.

residualRisks.title: Production-like deployment evidence remains unavailable until provider target setup completes.
residualRisks.mitigation: Keep #137/#141-#146 open and treat local CI as implementation evidence only.
